x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Discovery patterns are the mechanism by which Service Mapping populates CI relationships. Without active patterns, service maps become stale and Now Assist loses the relationship context it needs for impact traversal.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review and activate additional discovery patterns via sa_pattern_list.do. Ensure active patterns cover all key application types. Discovery patterns are the mechanism by which Service Mapping populates CI relationships for Now Assist ITOM impact traversal.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_b6f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c00
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Discovery patterns are the mechanism by which Service Mapping populates CI relationships. Without active patterns, service maps become stale and Now Assist loses the relationship context it needs for impact traversal.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Active Service Mapping Patterns</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sa_pattern');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active service mapping discovery patterns';

    if (count >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active service mapping patterns. Now Assist ITOM has comprehensive topology coverage for AI impact traversal across infrastructure types.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active service mapping patterns (target: 50+). Limited patterns mean Now Assist ITOM topology-based impact analysis will have gaps for uncovered infrastructure types.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Fewer than 5 active service mapping patterns. Now Assist ITOM topology-based impact analysis requires comprehensive pattern coverage to traverse CI relationships accurately.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITOM</module><number>CHK0000366</number><order>130</order><remediation_guidance>Review and activate additional discovery patterns via sa_pattern_list.do. Ensure active patterns cover all key application types. Discovery patterns are the mechanism by which Service Mapping populates CI relationships for Now Assist ITOM impact traversal.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>b6f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c00</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Active Service Mapping Patterns</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_b6f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c00</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
